title: besleria divaricata
intro: Besleria divaricata, also known as the "Fleshy Besleria," is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Besleria divaricata include reducing fever, treating skin irritations and wounds, and alleviating respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications, such as a poultice or salve, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
